content: *경이 물품, 희귀 (조율 필요)* --- 이 보석은 3회의 충전을 가지고 있습니다. [마법](/1def7f5a1e8081d69aa0f579a00ee48b?pvs=25) 행동으로 충전 1회를 소모하면, 보석을 통해 120ft 거리까지 [진시야](/1def7f5a1e8081d79457c6b1fdb58207?pvs=25)를 얻어 10분 동안 유지할 수 있습니다. 이 보석은 매일 새벽에 1d3 소모된 충전을 회복합니다. --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/12953390-41fd-49ca-8970-3ba150489d1c/638657413701524422.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB4666ATRUYVG%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T091929Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJGMEQCIDIluMv6wS2T6DfBR6ydd2eRrPzVANv8efioXTr23Yk7AiB3PIm%2FgHm6g3nhvJ8UaA%2FKaRmS%2FdmQbMsgt3w9qwVDASr%2FAwhwEAAaDDYzNzQyMzE4MzgwNSIMi05v4zDp6cL5vmt5KtwDJi%2B21NOW9xYxJ%2FfqThtjrXuK%2BsGvs6GPcroj6sGqTJHWM8ftxU0fUev9Kr1lBizag1l6X26wNt0F0eNpylsBibdZfQ6yRqWJPinEmLxoBr13KS03niQQ1vw63YZ5x%2FeRYEoa%2FHXs4FxtyGs1IEX2S7RvF6N9BGZaO2l8Aq8W13GBt3LEyLCEBH3hTlF%2FOLyfRifcs3PtndFrBkFZdn9VE37orb5G86w%2FNmXJwpqj5YtI2CuNjyzEQsFr2qVnEAceyfSDzHiFS0OFczC%2B5dvpKvveZKrzvwPW8V5ayg2OguZXC8Zk7jo7JwQSNf%2Bebdx%2BOupyFy2%2Fdmo3W4W2Ab5HQgjcMVNLNyUfhr%2Bw2LTcCchYy1YrnsBOKCsFz6Wbb6Bm3LomMnkIpaDwGFYv8ChnrXT%2B%2FKZQWVD1sBetrPBjNZlj7t6uKvUwhIRozRjX40FLKDhAFraeRc0tkzyvVhXtqBRjX5vkAlF19PvemiDbGfvTYvaDgkHjLyHAVcOc6kL2Jltt9wH4jkQpblVax%2BXaza4iArfakmayCYh57MobQb0lSm4SCVIa%2FgUG%2BkCvaM13f8vWyVAms3ZZLKitACFt27AYXJf8u8xjSawxjUXcO0XJ%2BLz2KioMOzVvDIYwnNrD0QY6pgFajSIiM9g8WCNrFxAH9qyexw0KbBiHUXXQQAv85Xie7sfRojFS72UlMB5oE%2BmGUMJ8np8PN3H78nkEIO8RiZeFg5Cg2CZnUgAv6iwutJSDFN2BWP6gll8Rkz9rJQzl2jg4NVEsFBzBqvqsdmlrrsiSaVLRAk6YsSkx39mMkhgb%2B0MkvUrwCrQv3KRMfpTxidi7d1Eu4NjKFTt6eV6yP5WOIvz3Q8Uh&X-Amz-Signature=be293c35d281645b44fe37fcf87653ae562910bc0ce3dfdcd3f557b56c2f7c95&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
